match.venue: New York/New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford

key_factors.text_cn: 姆巴佩被指转向9号位，法国可用他中路纵深威胁压迫塞内加尔中卫身后。
key_factors.text_en: Mbappe is reportedly moving to the No. 9 role, letting France use his central runs in behind Senegal's center-backs.

key_factors.text_cn: 盖耶预计居中拖后，身旁有Pape Gueye和Diarra，塞内加尔三中场可压缩中路。
key_factors.text_en: Gueye is expected to anchor in midfield alongside Pape Gueye and Diarra, with Senegal's midfield three able to compress the center.

key_factors.text_cn: 萨利巴已回归法国合练，若背伤疑虑缓解，法国防线前压和回追更有保障。
key_factors.text_en: Saliba has returned to France's training; if his back-injury concern eases, France's defense is more secure pressing up and tracking back.

key_factors.text_cn: 库利巴利带伤仍进28人名单，塞内加尔防线领袖的可用性仍是赛前变量。
key_factors.text_en: Koulibaly made the 28-man squad despite an injury, so the availability of Senegal's defensive leader remains a pre-match variable.

key_factors.text_cn: 比赛下午3点在东卢瑟福开球，若体感偏热，双方持续压迫可能下降、节奏更碎。
key_factors.text_en: Kickoff is 3 p.m. in East Rutherford; if it feels hot, sustained pressing from both sides may drop and the tempo become more fragmented.
